mapper.sql: select id, customer_name, customer_phone, first_service_time, last_service_time, total_appointments, total_orders, total_spent, tags, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from t_customer_profile
mapper.select:
and customer_name like concat('%', #{customerName}, '%') and customer_phone like concat('%', #{customerPhone}, '%')
order by last_service_time desc, create_time desc
mapper.update: update t_customer_profile set total_appointments = (select count(*) from t_appointment where customer_phone = (select customer_phone from t_customer_profile where id = #{id}) and status != '4'), total_orders = (select count(*) from t_order where customer_phone = (select customer_phone from t_customer_profile where id = #{id}) and status != '4'), total_spent = ifnull((select sum(order_amount) from t_order where customer_phone = (select customer_phone from t_customer_profile where id = #{id}) and status in ('1','2','3')), 0), first_service_time = (select min(appointment_time) from t_appointment where customer_phone = (select customer_phone from t_customer_profile where id = #{id}) and status = '3'), last_service_time = (select max(create_time) from (select create_time from t_appointment where customer_phone = (select customer_phone from t_customer_profile where id = #{id}) union all select create_time from t_order where customer_phone = (select customer_phone from t_customer_profile where id = #{id})) t), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: where customer_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or customer_phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by last_service_time desc, create_time desc
